subject: fix(builder): warn user when imported form hasn't been saved
body:
When the import API fails, the form data is passed via router state to
/forms/new. Previously this was silent — no feedback, and the router
state was immediately cleared so a refresh would lose the data.

Now:
- Shows an amber banner: "This imported form hasn't been saved yet.
  Click Create to save it."
- Keeps router state until save succeeds, so refresh preserves the data
- Clears banner and router state after successful save

Tags: bug, import, ux
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: form-builder
Semver: patch

title: warn user when imported form hasn't been saved
